title: caladenia rileyi
intro: Caladenia rileyi, also known as the Pink Fingers or Fairy Orchid, is a species of orchid native to Western Australia. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Caladenia rileyi include its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. Caladenia rileyi is typically prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and can also be used topically to treat skin conditions.
